stats.label: Sun Vulnerability
stats.note: Every hostile mob burns when exposed to direct sunlight across all dimensions.

stats.label: Daylight Threat
stats.note: Mobs catch fire and take amplified damage while respecting environmental conditions.

description.tagline: Hostile mobs burn violently in daylight with amplified sun damage, creating dangerous survival scenarios where sunlight becomes both protection and weapon.
description.title: All Mobs Hate The SUN

logo.subtitle: Enhanced sunlight vulnerability turns daylight into a weapon against hostile mobs with realistic burning mechanics.
logo.title: All Mobs Hate The SUN
